reasoning: I will provide a concise, neutral summary of the provided news excerpt, focusing on the key facts and stated actions by authorities without adding new speculation.
output: A human skull belonging to an adult male was found by workers near the M54 slip road at the Four Roundabout, near Telford. West Mercia Police say the skull has been at the site for at least two years, and further skeletal remains were found nearby. The eastbound entry slip road remains partially closed. Det Chief Insp Neil Jamieson said investigations are in the very early stages, with additional forensic examinations and excavations underway. Police are contacting neighbouring forces for missing-person information, and archaeological experts may be enlisted. Officials warn the process will be lengthy and promises updates as they become available.
